structure.description: Right-side rail on detail projection lists incoming references to the current entity, each item showing the surrounding paragraph (contextSnippet) — not just a title link. Clicking a backlink scrolls/navigates to the source paragraph. Distinct from a generic 'related items' list because the snippet preserves authorial context.

rationale.hypothesis: Backlinks without context are reduced to hyperlinked title-lists — readers must open each source to know why it links here. Snippet-attached backlinks externalize the why, making the rail scannable and turning the receiving entity into a passive aggregator of mentions.

evidence.description: Backlinks panel: each entry shows 1-3 lines of source paragraph around the link
'Linked References' section embeds the full block — even richer context

counterexample.description: Backlinks panel shows page titles only — confirms snippet-rich variant is a deliberate KB choice

shouldMatch.reason: Block.targetPageId edges + Block.content provide snippet — pattern fits cleanly

shouldNotMatch.reason: Edges to Asset are transactions/positions — no contextSnippet field, no narrative context
